note: The report confirms via satellite imagery (footnote [lxx]) that the combined force destroyed an intelligence office in Sarpol-e Zahab, Kermanshah Province, with the confirmation date being March 14 but the satellite imagery dating from March 6. It is unclear whether this strike was already logged as a March 6 event. If not logged, a new event should be created for the strike date (approximately 2026-03-06) at Sarpol-e Zahab (lat ~34.4611, lng ~45.8647).

raw.title: Combined force destroys intelligence office in Sarpol-e Zahab, Kermanshah Province
raw.description: Satellite imagery from March 6 confirmed that the combined force destroyed an intelligence office in Sarpol-e Zahab, Kermanshah Province.
